commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=b126d8b431a34548b04205c4c21a072c0c38cd98)
commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces the OpenAI-compatible embedding provider's successful JSON parsing with a 16 MiB capped `readResponseWithLimit` read before `JSON.parse`.

PR surface: Source +10. Total +10 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence runtime reproduction was established. Source inspection shows current main uses `response.json()` on the successful embedding response path, but I did not run an oversized OpenAI-compatible embedding server against current main.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor real behavior proof and a code update to use the shared provider JSON reader; the missing external proof keeps this out of the repair lane.

target.title: fix(plugins): bound OpenAI-compatible embeddings JSON response reads
target.author: cxbasdev

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
